# Wiki Tools

Read-oriented tools for the shared wiki store.

## Toolbox
- `wiki`

## Runtime
- `toolbox.py`

## Tools
- [[tool/external/wiki/search]]
- [[tool/external/wiki/read_page]]
- [[tool/external/wiki/read_source]]
- [[tool/external/wiki/answer]]

## Shared Boundary
- Wiki access must respect runtime permission scope.
- Prefer rendered wiki pages over raw source when both are sufficient.
